title: Accounts
subtitle: <0>Current balance</0> = opening balance + sum of transactions since that date.

deleteAccountDialog.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
deleteAccountDialog.description: This action is <1>irreversible</1>. If the account already has transactions, the server will refuse the deletion — move or delete the transactions concerned first.

form.openingBalanceEditHint: Changing this amount will automatically adjust the current balance.
form.lockYearsTitle: Number of years this account is locked starting from its opening date (PEA, term deposit, etc.). Leave empty if there is no lock.

errors.duplicateDate: A checkpoint already exists on this date for this account.
errors.invalidAmount: Invalid amount (number with up to 2 decimal places, e.g. 1234.56).
errors.invalidFields: Invalid fields — check the date, amount, and note.
errors.notFound: {{action}} failed: the checkpoint could not be found (already deleted?).
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired — please sign in again.

checkpoints.emptyState: No checkpoints yet. Add one to check your balances against a statement.

merge.title: Merge <1>{{name}}</1> into another account
merge.subtitle: Choose the destination account (same currency only).

warnings.moveTransactions: All transactions from the source will be moved to <1>{{name}}</1>.
warnings.addOpeningBalance: The opening balance ({{amount}}) will be added to that of <3>{{name}}</3>.
warnings.repoint: Patterns, checkpoints, budgets, and import history attached to the source will be repointed (any duplicates will be dropped, keeping the target's).
warnings.breakTransfers: Transfers between the two accounts will be broken (they become ordinary transactions again).
warnings.sourceDeleted: <0>{{name}}</0> will be deleted. This action is <2>irreversible</2>.
